title: OiCb (Optimization in Cherry Biomes)
body:
## Description

This texture pack optimizes the cherry biome by changing the resolution of the textures

### What is it for?
It is needed for owners of a very weak or weak video card

### Optimize what?
It optimizes important blocks in the Cherry biome

## Prove that it optimizes the biome
Here's a list of fps in each version of the texture resolution pack:

*Tested on Intel and 8 chunks*
- Default

Resolution 16x

FPS 30-higher

- Very High

Resolution 15x

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals

FPS 39-higher

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals

- High

Resolution 15x & 14x

FPS 41-higher

- Medium

Resolution 14x & 13x

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals

FPS 44-63 or higher

- Default (Low + Medium)

Resolution 13x & 12x

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals

FPS 46-63 or higher

- Low

Resolution 10x & 10x

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals

FPS 50-65 or higher

- Lite

Resolution 15x & 8x

Blocks: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals, Cherry Log

FPS 50-66 or higher

- Very Lite

Resolution 12x & 6x

Block: Cherry Leaves, Pink Petals, Cherry Log

FPS 52-higher
